fix: seeded agents showing XP exceeding xp_to_level

xpAtMidLevel was computing cumulative XP across all levels, but the
agent's XP field represents progress within the current level only.
A level 5 agent was getting xp=1012 with xp_to_level=759, showing
as 133%. Now correctly returns half the current level's XP threshold.

Add Google Photos import via Picker API

converges into the existing file order panel and /process endpoint.
Also adds WebP support and CLAUDE.md project instructions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: stop HikingMapWidget infinite subscribe/unsubscribe loop (#550)

Root cause: useEffect had `[user]` as dependency. The `user` object
reference changes on every AuthContext re-render (profile updates,
city state changes), causing the effect to re-run → unsubscribe →
resubscribe → onSnapshot fires → setState → re-render → repeat.

This produced 2600+ Firestore channel requests (addTarget/removeTarget
cycling) on the homepage.

Fix:
- Use `[uid]` (stable string) instead of `[user]` (unstable object ref)
- Remove redundant AUTH_STATE_CHANGED listener (uid dep handles it)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Migrate strategy_consumer to V2 spec/impl model (#1759)

* Migrate strategy_consumer to write V2 spec/impl data model

Add ensure_or_get_spec() and insert_implementation() methods to
PostgresClient, and update insert_strategies() to dual-write to both
the flat Strategies table and the new strategy_specs +
strategy_implementations tables. V2 writes use graceful degradation
(log errors but don't fail the flat table write).

registrations from server/index.js (lines 166-167 overwrote the
correct mounts at 145-146 with extra whitespace in path strings,
making the second mount the active one). Now each route registers

spin-start synthesised sound fires on every real spin.

commit.message:
Session 15: Nature spatial (WDPA/GFW) + Energy (GEM Coal) ingesters & API

A11 — WDPA/GFW nature spatial ingester:
- Combined ingester for UNEP-WCMC Protected Areas + Global Forest Watch
  tree cover loss data with fallback sample datasets
- 10 curated WDPA sample areas, 40-country GFW loss data (2001-2023)
- Upserts by wdpa_id (WDPA) and UUID5 composite key (GFW)

A12 — GEM Global Coal Plant Tracker ingester:
- CSV-based ingester with flexible column mapping for format variations
- 22 curated sample plants across 13 countries, all major statuses
- Upserts by gem_id, auto-generates per-unit records

Migration 030: 5 new tables
- dh_wdpa_protected_areas (WDPA site ID, IUCN cat, bbox, centroid)
- dh_gfw_tree_cover_loss (country-year deforestation with drivers)
- dh_gem_coal_plants (GEM ID, capacity, status, emissions)
- dh_gem_coal_plant_units (per-unit detail with FK cascade)
- dh_nature_spatial_overlaps (precomputed asset-PA overlaps)

Serve layer: 17 new API endpoints
- /api/v1/nature-data: WDPA search/countries/nearby, GFW search/timeseries,
  spatial overlaps, stats (9 endpoints)
- /api/v1/energy-data: coal plants search/countries/owners/nearby/pipeline,
  coal units, stats (8 endpoints)
- Haversine proximity queries use subquery pattern (no PostGIS needed)

Smoke tests: 34/34 passing across 8 test groups
Total ingesters: 10 registered, server routes: 622

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: JSON content pipeline for storylets

- content/storylets/arc-one.json — Arc One "College: First Week" (1983,
  Harwick University). 16 storylets across 6 streams: roommate, academic,
  money, social/belonging, opportunity, home. Full choices with outcomes,
  relational_effects, set_npc_memory, resource costs/rewards.

- content/schemas/storylet.schema.json — JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) for
  IDE autocomplete and validation. Add "$schema" key to content files to
  activate it in VS Code.

- scripts/generate-migration.ts — reads content/storylets/*.json, validates
  each entry, and outputs a Supabase SQL migration with upsert statements.
  Usage: npx tsx scripts/generate-migration.ts [--dry-run] [--output path]

- supabase/migrations/20260307013012_content_import.sql — generated
  migration with 16 INSERT … ON CONFLICT (slug) DO UPDATE statements.

feat: selection wrapping via Swing InputMap/ActionMap (KEY_TYPED)

characters. Switched to registering Swing KEY_TYPED bindings directly
on the editor component — same mechanism that makes component-level
shortcuts work for Bold/Italic. When text is selected and a trigger
character is typed (*, ~, _, `, |, -), it wraps contextually.

commit.message:
Remove dist/ from git tracking — Netlify builds it

Netlify runs npm run build and publishes dist/ itself.
Having stale dist/ files in git caused blank screen (HTML referenced
JS assets with different hashes that didn't exist).

Fix Router._role_model_map not initialized in __init__ (#42)

The _role_model_map dict was incorrectly placed inside
update_semantic_state() instead of __init__, causing an
AttributeError when resolve_model() was called before
update_semantic_state(). Moved it to __init__ where it belongs.

refactor: apply audit findings — fixture lifecycle, structure, client, coverage (#38)

- Replace in-test cleanup with journal_entry_factory yield fixture (items
  polluted DB on any assertion failure before cleanup line)
- Replace @pytest.mark.skip with @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True) on two
  tests; build now signals automatically when SUT issues #32/#33 are fixed
- Remove redundant isinstance/id>0/created_at assertions duplicated 4x;
  Pydantic model_validate already guarantees these types
- Add __init__.py to tests/, api/, api/clients/, api/schemas/,
  e2e/, e2e/pages/ — prevents import fragility in IDEs and static analysis
- Extract journal_page fixture into e2e/conftest.py; removes 2-line
  POM init repeated across all E2E tests
- Delete IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md (288-line one-off review changelog)
- Add APIClient._request() helper — deduplicates transport try/except,
  moves raise_for_status() before JSON parsing (fail-fast on HTTP errors),
  and provides a reusable foundation for future GET/DELETE methods
- Flatten tests/api/tests/ and tests/e2e/tests/ subdirectories; remove
  page.wait_for_timeout(500) fixed sleep from empty-form validation test

Closes #37

commit.message:
fix(auth): remove profile check from middleware, fix getCurrentUser getUser→getSession

Middleware was checking public.users profile existence from Edge Runtime, causing false
redirects due to RLS, transient DB errors, or missing profile rows. Pages already have
their own auth checks (getCurrentUser → redirect on null), so the middleware profile
check was redundant and error-prone.

Also changed getCurrentUser() from getUser() (network call, can fail transiently) to
getSession() (local JWT read, no auto-signout on error), consistent with session.ts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

opus-2026-03-06-S26: even-r polynomial for non-VT scalar-M tournament

Key insight: VT tournaments have each c_k individually scalar, while
non-VT position-uniform tournaments have non-scalar c_0, c_2 that
cancel at r=1/2 to give scalar M. The off-diagonal c_0 = 0.5 is
cancelled by c_2 off-diagonal = -2*0.25 = -0.5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace vault-based cron dispatch with edge function dispatcher

Root cause: pg_cron's SQL dispatcher read the service role key from vault,
but edge functions received a different key via auto-injected env vars.
The mismatch caused all cron-dispatched sync jobs to silently fail with 401.

Fix: New cron-dispatcher edge function uses its own auto-injected
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY (one source of truth) to call target functions.
Eliminates vault as a secret store for auth keys.

Also includes:
- GetLate API contract fixes (message vs text, accountId vs profileId)
- accountId caching in conversation metadata for reply operations
- Error toast notifications on failed inbox replies
- POST→PUT fix for getlate-posts update endpoint
- Contract test suite for GetLate API verification
- TDD skill and test manifest
- Bug-fixing discipline rule in CLAUDE.md
